title: Centralize post-commit notification dispatch
prompt: Refactor the shipment-release workflow so notification orchestration is owned by one internal dispatcher instead of `ShipmentReleaseService` calling handlers directly. Introduce an internal dispatcher abstraction and implementation, and make the workflow depend on that abstraction rather than on handler collections or the retry policy. The dispatcher must resolve every `INotificationHandler<TNotification>` from the current dependency-injection scope, preserve registration order, await handlers sequentially, and apply the existing retry policy independently to each handler. Keep notification delivery after the release transaction has committed: a handler failure must not move dispatch into the transaction or roll the committed release back. Register the dispatcher with scoped lifetime while preserving all existing service and handler registrations, including their types, order, and lifetimes. Do not expand the public API and do not modify the tests. Verification is offline and deterministic with `python3 -B tests/verify.py`.
